UTImage Converter
Home Calculator Download HTML

JPG and PNG Converter

Open a local image, remove a simple background, paint the alpha mask, then export. No upload step exists.

Image

Background Removal

Corner sample color

Use Sample mode and click the canvas if the corner color is not the background.

Mask Brush

Export

Waiting for an image.
Drop is not required. Use the file picker so the page never needs broad file-system access.
Tip: PNG keeps transparency. JPEG fills transparent pixels with white. Save Tool HTML
